# Code of Conduct

## Our standard

This is a personal project. Interactions in issues and pull requests should
be respectful and constructive.

Expected behaviour:

- Use welcoming and inclusive language
- Focus on the technical topic at hand
- Accept feedback gracefully
- Assume good intent

Unacceptable behaviour:

- Harassment, insults or personal attacks
- Spam or off-topic promotion
- Publishing others' private information without consent

## Enforcement

The project maintainer reserves the right to remove comments or block users
who violate this standard without further notice.

## Contact

For private concerns: info@tomflidr.cz
